word: G3561 - νουμηνία - noumēnía - noo-may-nee'-ah - New moon

sections.paragraph:
- Original: νουμηνία

- Transliteration: Noumenia

- Phonetic: noo-may-nee'-ah

- Definition:

1. new moon

a. of the Jewish festival of the new moon

- Origin: from of a compound of G3501 and G3376 (as noun by implication of G2250)

- TDNT entry: 4:638,*

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Feminine of a compound of G3501 and G3376 (as noun by implication of G2250); the festival of new moon: - new moon.
